## What Changed
In this pull request, I have implemented the PR hygiene standards by creating a standard template and a self-review checklist. These additions help in maintaining code quality and ensuring that all necessary steps are completed before a review.

## Why
Establishing these engineering practices is essential for making code reviewable and maintainable. It creates a "self-review gate" that catches common errors and ensures consistency across the repository.

## How to Test
1. Check for the existence of the .github and docs directories.
2. Open the pull_request_template.md and pr-checklist.md files to verify their content.
3. Read the README.md to ensure the "How to run" section is present and clear.

## Checklist
- [ ] I have verified that all files are in their correct directories.
- [ ] I have followed the project documentation standards.
